name: 08B — Book Auto-Publisher (D2D + PublishDrive) + KDP Upload Guide

nodes.name: ⏰ Check for Books Ready to Publish (Every 4h)

parameters.body:
={
  "title": "{{ $json.title }}",
  "subtitle": "{{ $json.subtitle }}",
  "contributors": [
    {
      "role": "Author",
      "first_name": "ClearStack",
      "last_name": "Studio"
    }
  ],
  "description": "{{ $json.description_html }}",
  "language": "{{ $json.language }}",
  "keywords": {{ JSON.stringify($json.keywords) }},
  "bisac_codes": ["BUS000000"],
  "price": {{ $json.price_usd }},
  "currency": "USD",
  "is_public_domain": false,
  "adult_content": false,
  "distribution": {
    "apple_books": true,
    "barnes_noble": true,
    "kobo": true,
    "scribd": true,
    "overdrive": true,
    "bibliotheca": true,
    "baker_taylor": true,
    "tolino": true
  }
}

nodes.name: 📚 Draft2Digital — Create Book
nodes.notes: SETUP: Get API token at draft2digital.com/account/api. Creates book record across 40+ stores including Apple Books, Barnes & Noble, Kobo, Scribd. Free to use — they take 10% of royalties.

nodes.name: 📚 Draft2Digital — Upload Files
nodes.notes: Uploads EPUB and cover to Draft2Digital. Uses the book ID from previous step.

nodes.name: 📚 Draft2Digital — Publish to All Stores
nodes.notes: Triggers distribution to all 40+ stores. D2D handles Apple Books, B&N, Kobo, Scribd, and more simultaneously.

nodes.name: 🌍 PublishDrive — Create Book
nodes.notes: SETUP: Get API token at publishdrive.com. PublishDrive distributes to 400+ stores globally including Google Play Books, Scribd subscription, and international markets. ~70% royalty rate. Monthly fee applies.

nodes.name: 📋 Build KDP Upload Guide
nodes.notes: Generates the complete step-by-step KDP upload guide with all values pre-filled. You literally just copy-paste each field. Takes ~5 minutes per book.

nodes.name: 📊 Write KDP Upload Guide to Sheets
nodes.notes: Writes pre-filled KDP upload guide to a dedicated sheet tab. Open this tab, follow each step, copy-paste each value into KDP dashboard.

main.node: 📊 Write KDP Upload Guide to Sheets

meta.description: Workflow 08B: Book auto-publisher. Auto-publishes to Draft2Digital (40+ stores) and PublishDrive (400+ stores) via API. Generates pre-filled KDP upload guide with copy-paste values for the 5-minute manual KDP upload. Updates queue status in Google Sheets.
